dct_description_sm: New York City Street Trees, 2005 is a point theme representing street trees in New York City as tabulated from the 2005 Street Tree Census. The Street Tree Census was conducted by volunteers and staff organized by NYC Parks and Recreation and partner organizations. Tree data collected includes tree species, diameter and perception of health. A codebook is included with the download files. This Geopackage layer was created by Columbia Libraries from the csv file downloaded on 8/22/23 from NYC Open Data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Environment/2005-Street-Tree-Census/29bw-z7pj
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Parks and Recreation
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Parks and Recreation
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Parks and Recreation
